steps: Go to https://wise.com and log in to your account (a Wise account with 2-step verification enabled is required)
For a personal account: go to https://wise.com/settings/api-tokens
For a business account: select your business profile, then go to Account Settings > Integrations and Tools > API Tokens
Give the token a descriptive name and choose permissions (Read-only or Full access)
Copy the generated API token — it may not be shown again in full

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Your Wise personal API token (used as Bearer token in Authorization header)

notes: 2-step verification must be enabled on your Wise account before generating API tokens
A free Sandbox environment is available at https://sandbox.transferwise.tech — sign up with just email and password, no verification required
Personal tokens are suitable for personal automation; business OAuth 2.0 is available for third-party apps
Production API base URL is https://api.wise.com; Sandbox is https://api.sandbox.transferwise.tech

test_endpoint.description: List profiles to verify the API token
